    rw [Finset.pairwise_image]; intro i hi j hj hij; apply (next_n _ _ _).2.2)) -- This is still messy, let's use a simpler construction.

let f_pair : ℕ → ℕ+ × ℕ := λ n ↦ n.rec (⟨2, by omega⟩, 1)

    intro n; induction' n with n ih
    · rfl

      have hf := f_ge_2 n;

        rw [pow_succ, pow_succ, pow_succ];
        repeat rw [Nat.mul_mod];
        rfl

    intro n m hnm; induction' hnm with k _ ih
    · dsimp [f, f_pair]; omega
    · trans f (k + 1); exact ih; dsimp [f, f_pair]; omega

  rintro _ ⟨j, rfl⟩ _ ⟨i, rfl⟩ hne

  · exact (this hne.symm (Set.mem_range_self i) (Set.mem_range_self j) (h_1.symm)).symm

    induction' j with j ih; · rfl

    cases' j with j; · omega

    have h2L : Nat.Coprime 2 (L j) := by rw [Nat.coprime_comm, Nat.prime_two.coprime_iff_not_dvd]; intro h; rw [← Nat.dvd_iff_mod_eq_zero, L_odd] at h; omega
    rw [Nat.ModEq.pow _ (Nat.pow_totient h2L), Nat.ModEq.pow _ (by rfl), one_pow, Nat.one_mul]

      rw [Nat.ModEq.pow _ (Nat.pow_totient h2L)]; dsimp [Nat.ModEq]; rw [Nat.mul_mod, Nat.one_pow, Nat.one_mul]
    rw [Nat.mod_eq_of_lt (by have := L_pos j; have := L_odd j; omega)] at h_mod

      have h_mod_j : (2 ^ (f j).val) % L j = 2 % L j := h_mod

let f : ℕ → ℕ
  | 0 => 3
  | n + 1 =>
    let M := (Finset.range (n + 1)).prod (fun i ↦ 2 ^ f i - 3)
    (f n + 1) * Nat.totient (if M = 0 then 1 else M) + 2
  have f_ge_three (n : ℕ) : f n ≥ 3 := by
    induction' n with n ih
    · exact le_refl 3
    · dsimp [f]
      calc f (n + 1) = (f n + 1) * Nat.totient _ + 2
        _ ≥ (3 + 1) * 1 + 2 := by mono; exact Nat.totient_pos.mpr (by positivity)
        _ ≥ 3 := by norm_num
  have f_increasing (n : ℕ) : f n < f (n + 1) := by
    dsimp [f]
    let M := (Finset.range (n + 1)).prod (fun i ↦ 2 ^ f i - 3)
    have hM : M > 0 := Finset.prod_pos (fun i _ ↦ by dsimp; have := f_ge_three i; omega)
    calc f n < f n + 3 := by omega
      _ ≤ (f n + 1) * 1 + 2 := by omega
      _ ≤ (f n + 1) * Nat.totient M + 2 := by mono; exact Nat.totient_pos.mpr hM
  have f_injective : Function.Injective f := strictMono_nat_of_lt_succ f_increasing |>.injective
  let s : Set ℕ+ := Set.range (fun n ↦ ⟨f n, by have := f_ge_three n; omega⟩)
  use s
  constructor
  · exact Set.infinite_range_of_injective (fun n m h ↦ f_injective (by injection h))
  · rintro ⟨n, rfl⟩ ⟨m, rfl⟩ hnm
    wlog hmn : m < n
    · exact (this hnm.symm (hmn.lt_or_lt.resolve_left hnm).symm).symm
    let M := (Finset.range n).prod (fun i ↦ 2 ^ f i - 3)
    have hM_odd : M % 2 = 1 := Finset.prod_induction _ _ (fun x y h1 h2 ↦ by rw [Nat.mul_mod, h1, h2]; rfl) (by rfl) (fun i hi ↦ by have := f_ge_three i; omega)
    have hM_pos : M > 0 := by omega
    have h2M : Nat.Coprime 2 M := Nat.coprime_of_dvd__left (fun h ↦ by rw [h] at hM_odd; norm_num at hM_odd)
    have h_mod : 2 ^ f n % M = 4 % M := by
      dsimp [f]
      rw [Nat.add_comm, Nat.pow_add, Nat.pow_mul, Nat.ModEq.pow_totient h2M]
      simp only [Nat.ModEq.one_pow, Nat.one_mul, Nat.ModEq]
    have h_coprime : Nat.Coprime (2 ^ f n - 3) M := by
      have h3M : 3 < 2 ^ f n := by have := f_ge_three n; omega
      have : (2 ^ f n - 3) % M = (4 - 3) % M := by
        rw [Nat.sub_mod h3M, h_mod]
        have h4M : 4 < M := by
          have : 2 ^ f 0 - 3 ≤ M := Finset.single_le_prod (fun i _ ↦ by have := f_ge_three i; omega) (Finset.mem_range.mpr hmn.trans_le (by omega))
          exact this.trans_le (by rfl)
        rw [Nat.sub_mod h4M]
      rw [Nat.coprime_iff_gcd_eq_one, Nat.gcd_rec, this]
      exact Nat.gcd_one_left M
    exact Nat.coprime_of_dvd__right (Finset.dvd_prod (Finset.mem_range.mpr hmn)) h_coprime
